title: Thai-Style Pan-Seared Fish with Stout Beer Glaze
description: A flavorful Thai-inspired dish featuring pan-seared fish glazed with a rich stout beer reduction.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add Thai red curry paste and stir for 1 minute.
Add cod fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While fish is cooking, reduce stout beer in a separate saucepan over medium heat until thickened, stirring occasionally.
Stir in fish-safe salt to taste.
Add reduced stout beer glaze to cooked fish and serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and sliced Thai chilies.
Serve with a squeeze of lemon juice and additional Thai red curry paste on the side, if desired.
